series_metadata.series_description: The Site and Equipment Support Files are records documenting support services provided to specific data processing equipment or installations including site visit reports, program and equipment service reports, service histories, correspondence, and memoranda.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain site visit reports, problem and equipment service reports, and routine correspondence and memoranda until warranty or guarantee of service has expired, and then destroy. Retain service histories and other summary records until the related equipment is no longer in use, and then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain site visit reports, problem and equipment service reports, and routine correspondence and memoranda until warranty or guarantee of service has expired, and then destroy. Retain service histories and other summary records until the related equipment is no longer in use, and then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
